# AppClipAdvancedExperienceCreateRequest.Data.Attributes.Place.MainAddress

**Object**

The main address for a point of interest or business in Apple Maps.

## Declaration

```swift
object AppClipAdvancedExperienceCreateRequest.Data.Attributes.Place.MainAddress
```

## Objects

- **AppClipAdvancedExperienceCreateRequest.Data.Attributes.Place.MainAddress.StructuredAddress**: The structured address information for a point of interest or business in Apple Maps.

## Objects

- **AppClipAdvancedExperienceCreateRequest.Data.Attributes.Place.DisplayPoint**: A point-based representation of a place in Apple Maps.
- **AppClipAdvancedExperienceCreateRequest.Data.Attributes.Place.PhoneNumber**: The phone number of a point of interest or business in Apple Maps.
